description_long: This is a large, urban traffic light assembly mounted on a tall, sturdy metal pole with an extended horizontal arm that projects over a roadway. The structure supports three horizontally aligned traffic signal lights, each housed in a rectangular casing, and a street name sign hanging beneath the arm. At the end of the arm, a single street lamp is attached, providing illumination for the intersection below. The pole also features a visible control box and additional signal equipment mounted near its base. The entire assembly is painted in a dark color, likely black, and is designed to be highly visible and durable for outdoor urban environments.
description: A robust, pole-mounted traffic light assembly with three horizontal signal lights, a street sign, and an overhead street lamp.
description_view_0: The main view shows the full horizontal arm with three traffic lights, a street sign, and the street lamp extending outward.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the thinness of the arm and the vertical alignment of the pole, with the signal lights and lamp visible in profile.
description_view_2: This view highlights the length of the horizontal arm, the arrangement of the signal lights, and the street sign hanging below.
description_view_3: Another side profile, similar to view 1, showing the pole, lamp, and the stacked arrangement of the signal lights from the opposite side.
